about.name: Services
about.description: We are a congregation that worships in Funyula, Busia - Kenya. We gather for worship in our sanctuary at 9:30 am, 11:00 am, and 4:00 pm each Sunday. Join us for the sound teaching and preaching of God's Word.

about.name: Sermons
about.description: We are a Bible teaching church in Funyula, Busia - Kenya, teaching verse by verse through God’s Word at Segero - Near the Chief in Funyula, along Bumala - Port Victoria Road. We maintain a repository of the collective sermons from our pulpit.

about.name: Ministries
about.description: If you want a place to learn God's Word, Serve, Give and Grow in your Faith, we welcome you to join us as we take this exciting journey together, watching the Lord build this church.  We pray this will be God’s work and not ours and that it  will have a lasting impact on Funyula, Busia - Kenya and the World.  To God be the glory!
